name: Claude Code (with host credential passthrough)
description: Installs Anthropic's Claude Code CLI and bind-mounts the host's ~/.claude/.credentials.json into the container so you don't have to re-authenticate.

version.description: Version of @anthropic-ai/claude-code to install from npm (e.g. 'latest', '1.2.3').

nodeVersion.description: Informational only. The node feature dependency is pinned to 'lts'; to override, add ghcr.io/devcontainers/features/node yourself with the desired version.

passthroughHostAuth.description: If true, pass the host's Claude Code authentication into the container on first start: symlink ~/.claude/.credentials.json (so token refreshes write back to the host) AND copy ~/.claude.json (account/onboarding state, copied not linked because Claude Code rewrites it constantly and live-linking would pollute the host). Both halves are needed together — credentials alone leaves Claude re-running onboarding, and account state alone leaves it unauthenticated — so this is a single switch. The bind mounts themselves are always declared by this feature; this option only controls whether the link/copy happens at postCreate.
